tasks.title: Deploy Fara-7B + Magentic-UI on DGX
tasks.description: Run the full deployment: 1) HF token is already at ~/.config/huggingface/token. 2) Run 'bash ~/mas-workspace/scripts/dgx/setup-vllm.sh' to pull the vLLM image and start Fara-7B on port 5000. 3) Wait for vLLM healthcheck: curl http://localhost:5000/v1/models (may take several minutes for model to load). 4) Run 'bash ~/mas-workspace/scripts/dgx/setup-magentic-ui.sh' to install Magentic-UI. 5) Run 'bash ~/mas-workspace/scripts/dgx/manage-magentic-ui.sh start'. 6) Run 'bash ~/mas-workspace/scripts/dgx/smoke-test.sh' and report results.

tasks.title: 3-node system health check
tasks.description: Collaborative health check across all 3 nodes. Hub: collect your local system info (hostname, OS, uptime, node/python versions) and report it. DGX: collect your system info (hostname, GPU name, Docker containers running, vLLM status via 'curl -s http://localhost:5000/v1/models | head -c 100') and report it along with what hub reported. Mac Mini: collect your system info (hostname, OS, uptime) and compile a final summary of ALL 3 nodes into your report.
